seo.title: Leaving the editor with unsaved typed content gives no warning — and silently creates an orphan draft
seo.note: P0-6 is fully fixed. The implementation addresses all aspects of the issue: (1) navigation is intercepted via click/beforeunload/popstate listeners, (2) a three-option dialog prompts users (Save/Discard/Keep editing), (3) a visible notice explains that drafts are auto-created and can be discarded on exit, (4) the server applies a strict safety floor that only deletes never-saved auto-created drafts (status=draft, no publish history, no revisions). All 55 unit tests and 9 browser verification tests pass. The fix prevents silent orphan draft creation while preserving user consent and data integrity.

seo.title: No revisions until first publish — a draft mangled before publishing has no page-level undo
seo.note: Issue P1-7 ("draft mangled before publishing has no page-level undo") is FIXED. On every manual 'Save draft' (intent !== 'publish'), saveSeoPage now calls snapshotManualSaveRevisionSafely, which creates a manual_save revision snapshot and prunes to keep only the 20 most recent manual_save revisions per page. Failures are caught and logged but never fail the user's save. This provides restore points throughout the drafting process, not just on first publish.

seo.title: No keyboard shortcuts (save/publish/insert block)
seo.note: Keyboard shortcuts fully implemented and working. Pure matcher function (resolveEditorShortcut) handles Cmd/Ctrl+S (save), Cmd/Ctrl+Enter (publish), and '/' (block picker open). Hook useEditorKeyboardShortcuts wires actions to existing affordances, respecting all gates. All 103 tests in seo-page-editor module pass.

seo.title: Forced 'Quick Tour · Step 1 of 3' overlay covers the canvas on first editor open
seo.note: The Quick Tour is now fully opt-in with a dismissible launcher button that appears when the component mounts. The tour overlay no longer auto-starts on editor open, and the canvas is never forced under a modal. The local activeStep state starts as null, rendering only the launcher affordance until the user clicks to begin the tour. Unit tests (no auto-render, visible launcher) and browser verification (6/6 passing) confirm the fix.

seo.note: All jargon flagged in P2-9 has been systematically fixed across the editor UI: Eyebrow→Overline (eyebrow), CTA→Call to action (CTA) on first use, Slug→URL ending (slug), Governance comments expanded with context, Builder support expanded with detailed help, Governance→Internal & social (with help text), and bare HTTP redirect codes→words-first labels (301→Permanent move, etc.). Issue was non-code (external widget/overlay).

seo.title: Duplicate page generates a junk slug ('draft-4020bd0f') instead of deriving from the source
seo.note: The duplicate slug generation has been completely replaced. Old behavior generated random hash slugs like 'draft-4020bd0f'; new code derives '{source-slug}-copy' with sequential collision handling (-copy-2, -copy-3, etc.). Uniqueness scope respects the active-route-path index (non-archived pages only). Implementation verified via 13 unit tests + 2 service tests (all passing), and UI copy updated to reflect new behavior.
evidence: src/lib/services/duplicate-slug.ts:1-52 (deriveCopySlug implementation with {source-slug}-copy and -copy-N collision handling)
src/lib/services/seo-pages.ts:245-247 (adminDuplicateSeoPage uses deriveCopySlug with isActiveRoutePathTaken predicate)
src/app/admin/pages/page.tsx:958 (updated confirmation message reflects -copy slug pattern)
